title: fumaria agraria var. atlantica
intro: Fumaria agraria var. atlantica, also known as rock cress or Atlantic fumitory, is a plant species belonging to the fumitory family (Fumariaceae) and is characterized by its bright yellow flowers and hairy leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Fumaria agraria var. atlantica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as an antidote for certain toxic substances. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
